response:
Sec. 1  
peanuts are a type of food that contains proteins which can trigger an allergic reaction in some individuals  
the immune system of someone allergic to peanuts may react negatively to the presence of peanuts in any environment  
allergic reactions can occur in any environment including underwater where peanuts may be present  

Sec. 2  
the body of an allergic person is not adapted to the pressure and conditions of underwater environments  
the lack of oxygen and the presence of different substances in water can affect the body in ways that are not present in air  
the physical properties of water can make it difficult for the body to function normally in underwater environments
